scenarios.title: Dataset Processing, Evaluation, and Hub Workflows
scenarios.when_to_read: Dataset loading, schemas, streaming, format conversion, metric/evaluator modules, benchmark task selection, result caches, data validation, and Hub or CLI workflows.
scenarios.role: Use MTEB to evaluate embedding models, select tasks and benchmarks, validate model protocols, run CLI workflows, inspect result caches, and contribute tasks/models/benchmarks.
scenarios.read_when: The request names `mteb` or asks for package-specific APIs, CLIs, configs, data/model artifacts, error messages, workflows, or repository maintenance that match this project.
scenarios.best_for: cli and automation, contributing to mteb, evaluation workflows, models and encoders, results and leaderboard, and tasks and benchmarks.
scenarios.avoid_when: another repo skill in this scenario matches the user's task, package, model family, data format, serving backend, or workflow more directly.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose `mteb` when the request names `mteb`, centers on Use MTEB to evaluate embedding models, select tasks and benchmarks, validate model protocols, run CLI workflows, inspect result caches, and contribute tasks/models/benchmarks, uses its APIs or CLIs, references its configs/artifacts/errors, or asks for repository workflows in dataset processing evaluation and hub workflows. Then route to CLI and automation, contributing to mteb, evaluation workflows, or models and encoders when those focused workflows match.
